chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P.No.D- 2623 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For orders on MA 10736/2018. 3. For orders on MA 10737/2018. 4. For hearing of main case. 24.04.2019. Mr. S. M. Imran Alvi, Advocate for petitioners. = After arguing the matter at some length, learned counsel for the petitioners submits that since he has grievance against the private respondents encroaching upon the alleged government land, he would file proper proceedings before Anti Encroachment Tribunal, Hyderabad for redressal of his grievance. In the light of above and in the said terms, the petition stands disposed of alongwith listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE Tufail/PA
